title: Usopp Refuses to Give Up
description: On pages 14–17, usopp refuses to give up as mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks.
scene: Usopp Refuses to Give Up. Mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Get ready to have your asses kicked!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry?
dialogue.text: Master Brogy! We shall avenge your agony!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Beat these losers' faces into an un- recognizable pulp and send them flying as far away as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's what I plan to do!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: These bastards defiled the Giants' duel!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah, so you're the one they call East Blue's most wanted man, are you now...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: seems the marine HQ has dropped their standards quite a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Start by destroying this pillar or we'll turn into wax-figures!

summary: This part centers on usopp refuses to give up, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
